description: Deliberate divergences between C and Rust implementations. The ast-compare tool should suppress warnings for these.

errors.NoMemory: Rust uses owned types (Vec, String, HashMap) so allocation failures panic rather than returning error codes
errors.AmplificationLimitBreach: Billion laughs protection not yet ported (tracked separately)

handlers.startNamespaceDeclHandler: Namespace handling not yet ported (tracked separately)
handlers.endNamespaceDeclHandler: Namespace handling not yet ported (tracked separately)

function_pairs.notes: Prolog tokenization loop. Role dispatch is split into handle_prolog_role in Rust.
XML declaration processing is inline in handle_prolog_role, not in process_xml_decl (which is dead code)

do_content.notes: Entity lookup uses HashMap instead of C hash table + pool. No pool/memory management errors.

do_prolog.notes: Role handling split into handle_prolog_role. Most role cases are in handle_prolog_role, not do_prolog itself.

epilog_processor.notes: C has -XML_TOK_PROLOG_S (negative token = trailing CR). Rust tokenizer returns XmlTok::TrailingCr instead.
